# Control Tower session — opening checklist

**Use for:** Starting a **Control Tower orchestration** chat (coordination only unless tiny doc fixes are in scope).

Copy into the thread and check off mentally or inline.

---

## Repo truth (read before steering)

- [ ] [`AGENTS.md`](../../AGENTS.md)
- [ ] [`DECISIONS.md`](../../DECISIONS.md)
- [ ] [`docs/PROJECT_BRIEF.md`](../PROJECT_BRIEF.md) / [`docs/V1_SCOPE.md`](../V1_SCOPE.md) as needed
- [ ] [`docs/PROJECT_STATUS.md`](../PROJECT_STATUS.md)
- [ ] [`docs/SLICE_PLAN.md`](../SLICE_PLAN.md)
- [ ] Latest relevant **`docs/ai/run_receipts/*.md`**
- [ ] Derived [`docs/ai/AGENT_HANDOFF.md`](../ai/AGENT_HANDOFF.md)

## Lane guard

- [ ] This session is **orchestration**, not primary coding (implementation → separate bounded chat).
- [ ] No **new** broad scope or decision locks without strategy / `DECISIONS.md` path.

## Next slice

- [ ] Next work matches **smallest safe** slice from plan + decisions (conflicts → fix docs first, not “chat override”).
- [ ] Slice charter points at contracts + [`SLICE_INTAKE_TEMPLATE.md`](SLICE_INTAKE_TEMPLATE.md) if helpful.

## Research posture

- [ ] Any cited research is **advisory** until in repo canon; no silent override of locked decisions.

## When this Control Tower session changes the repo

- [ ] [`POST_CHAT_CLOSEOUT.md`](../WORKFLOWS/POST_CHAT_CLOSEOUT.md) — receipt + `PROJECT_STATUS` if focus shifted + handoff per [`AGENT_HANDOFF_STANDARD.md`](../WORKFLOWS/AGENT_HANDOFF_STANDARD.md).

---

**Canon:** [`docs/WORKFLOWS/CONTROL_TOWER.md`](../WORKFLOWS/CONTROL_TOWER.md)
